title: Mystic Beacon
description:
The texture and appearance of the beacon have been changed, giving it a mystical look.

The design is based on the "Arcle's Medieval Containers" texture pack, giving it a fresher feel.
body:
# **What's changing?**
This texture pack changes the appearance of the beacon, giving it a mystical look.










## _personal note:_
- I recommend using it with the "Subtle Effects" mod for the particles it adds to the beacon as well as other things in Minecraft, but if you don't want to, you won't miss anything relevant.

- Its design is based on the "Arcle's Medieval Containers" texture pack, giving it a fresher touch.

##
